description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image and two services: selenium/standalone-chrome:latest and appuio/example-spring-boot. Define a variable selenium_remote_url set to http://selenium__standalone-chrome:4444/wd/hub/. Add a global before_script that runs curl "http://appuio__example-spring-boot:8080". In the default stage add a cucumber job that executes the command cat /etc/hosts, with no artifacts, caches, or rules.
